response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, broad-spectrum software engineer with 15+ years of experience and genuine staff-level depth, and his current role at re:cinq directly touches MCP server development and agentic workflow infrastructure, which aligns with the role's core delivery surface. However, the required 8+ years of AI-driven solution development is not substantiated — GenAI work appears only in the most recent position. Python, the dominant language in production AI/ML engineering, is entirely absent from his skills. There is no demonstrated exposure to vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or observability frameworks for AI systems, all of which are central to this role's day-to-day responsibilities.
strengths: Direct, current hands-on experience building MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Proven staff-level technical breadth across distributed systems, data pipelines, and high-throughput micro-services (Dunnhumby, GISCollective)
Strong public knowledge-sharing track record (conference talks, workshops, open-source projects) consistent with the mentoring and technical leadership expectations of the role
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the skills list and work history — a critical gap given it is the primary language for AI/ML engineering in this role
No evidence of experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation, or AI observability frameworks
GenAI depth appears shallow and recent; the required 8+ years of AI-driven solution development is not demonstrated by the resume
